name: Cranberry Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a fork, in a large bowl combine flour, sugar, orange peel, baking powder, and baking soda. With a pastry blender, cut in margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Add cranberries and currants; stir to combine. Add buttermilk and vanilla extract to the flour mixture and stir until combined (mixture will be dry). Form dough into 2 equal balls.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F. Sprinkle a clean work surface with 1 tablespoon of reserved flour. On the floured surface, using fingertips, roll out one-half of the dough into a 6-inch circle, about 1/2-inch thick. Cut the circle into 6 equal wedges; place wedges on a non-stick baking sheet, leaving about 1 inch between each. Repeat with the remaining flour and dough. Bake until lightly browned, about 10 to 15 minutes. Remove scones to a wire rack and let cool.
